title: defaultToolRegistry() hardcoded tool set
notes: Needs Agent identity + per-task Contract tool_scopes

title: dispatcher hardcoded AutonomyLevelLow
notes: Needs competence profile + autonomy rule engine

title: multi-turn loop cap=10 termination
notes: Needs Agent stop signal (__done tool)

title: Permission scopes never checked
notes: Needs Permission Ladder infrastructure

title: syscall tools are empty shells
notes: Needs scheduler integration interface

title: Set* temporal coupling
notes: Wait for AgentConfig struct refactor

title: circuit breaker=5 hardcoded
notes: Can be Contract field, low priority

title: dispatcher no audit log
notes: Needs structured event emitter

title: mock provider silent default
notes: Reasonable for dev, fix before production

title: FileWriteTool path validation weaker than FileReadTool
notes: Security fix, can be done independently

title: Judge: generalization scoring (OOD/ID ratio)
notes: Agent cannot upgrade on familiar tasks alone. Threshold: >=0.8 upgrade, <0.5 downgrade

title: Autonomy Transition rule refactor
notes: Replace consecutive-success with: resource-constrained + OOD + architecture-driven

title: Permission Ladder Level 0 whitelist
notes: Initial command whitelist: ls/cat/grep/wc/git/go build/go test

title: Refactor: split orchestrator
notes: Extract ToolRegistryBuilder + ExecutorFactory, orchestrator only does scheduling loop

title: Refactor: AgentConfig struct
notes: Unify provider/tools/skills/compaction into single config, eliminate Set* method chain

title: Subagent context isolation
notes: Parent fresh context dispatch, subagent returns summary only

title: Guarantee Registry
notes: Explicit auditable system guarantees. Sublated from arXiv:2605.12239 Know layer

title: Quality-Gated Model Escalation
notes: Judge score < threshold -> auto upgrade provider tier. Sublated from arXiv:2605.12239

title: Background Tasks async execution
notes: Slow operations go background, Agent continues thinking

title: Feature progressive unlock (BashTool/Evolution/Permissions)
notes: 30 tasks + accuracy>=90% + generalization>=0.8 + reliability>=95% + zero violations

title: Unified Capability registration interface
notes: Capability interface (tool + prompt injection + config), register in one line

title: Provider semantic layering (Execute vs Utility)
notes: Independent quotas and model selection for dialogue vs summarization/judge/embedding

title: Multi-Agent collaboration (JSONL mailbox)
notes: JSONL mailbox protocol + auto-claim + worktree integration

title: Skills composable metadata
notes: input_type/output_type/composable_with in SKILL.md frontmatter. Sublated from arXiv:2605.12239

title: CodingAgent spec: requirements.md + design.md
notes: Based on first-principles.md, implement 4-Phase tool call ordering + output format Contract

title: Research: Symbolic Equivalence Partitioning (arXiv:2604.06485)
notes: CodingAgent P2: equivalence classes for code selection. +7.2% at N=10

title: Research: Variational Posterior Guidance (arXiv:2605.11019)
notes: Compression = finding equivalent short paths. Maps to three-layer compaction

title: Research: Token-Level Hallucination Detection 0.6B (arXiv:2605.12384)
notes: Lightweight judge surpasses QwQ-32B. Maps to Judge drafter/verifier pattern

title: Judge must use independent short context (Context Rot fix)
notes: arXiv:2605.12366: 800K token閸氬孩绱″Λ鈧悳?x-30x. Judge閸欘亞婀協inal artifacts+task spec, 娑撳秶婀呯€瑰本鏆ranscript.

title: CodingAgent: multi-candidate generation + differential testing
notes: arXiv:2604.06485 SEP: generate N>=3 candidates, run same inputs, select dominant equivalence class. Replaces single-shot + verify.

title: ContextBundle: task-aware compression scoring
notes: arXiv:2605.11019 VPG-EA: score context chunks by task relevance before compression. Not simple truncation.

title: Judge: lightweight first-pass + escalation gate
notes: arXiv:2605.12384 TokenHD: 0.6B beats QwQ-32B at hallucination detection. Cheap judge first, expensive only on demand.

title: Runtime startup: mark orphaned running/pending tasks as abandoned
notes: On axis start, scan event log for running/pending tasks from previous PID. Append abandoned event. Prevents zombie tasks in GUI/event stream.

title: Docker-based SandboxedBashTool (true process/network/fs isolation)
notes: Implement SandboxedBashTool using docker exec. Low trust tasks run in container (read-only project mount + tmpfs workdir + network none + resource limits). Fallback to direct exec if Docker unavailable. Replaces L0 whitelist as primary security boundary.

title: Rename Sandboxed Evolution to Staged Evolution (remaining: spec directory + file refs)
notes: README already uses 'Staged Evolution Protocol'. Remaining: rename docs/specs/sandboxed-evolution/ directory to docs/specs/staged-evolution/, update internal cross-references. Downgraded from P0 to P2 since public-facing naming is already correct.

title: Autonomy negative feedback: auto-downgrade on consecutive failures
notes: AutonomyRules has upgrade path but no downgrade trigger. Add: N consecutive task failures -> auto-downgrade autonomy level. N consecutive tool errors -> restrict to L0 whitelist.

title: Runaway detection: semantic progress tracking
notes: VALIDATED by iter-07b: Agent blind-retried 'go test' twice (turns 1-2 identical output). Runaway detection would save 1 turn. Impl: if last 2 tool calls have identical command+output -> inject 'try different approach' feedback instead of abort. Cheap heuristic, proven needed.

title: Honest positioning: README/docs reflect single-user dev tool, not distributed infra
notes: README has explicit 'Current Limitations' section covering: single-machine, no multi-tenant, Docker dependency, Self-Judgement advisory, no production validation.

title: Real-world validation: run 10+ coding tasks, collect data, calibrate parameters
notes: DONE: 25+ tasks executed. MaxIterations=20/MaxErrors=5/TurnTimeout=60s adequate. ExecutionJudge 4-criteria replaces rubber-stamp. See validation-report-2026-05-14.md

title: Reposition SelfJudgement as auxiliary signal, not reliable verdict
notes: README Current Limitations states: 'Self-Judgement is advisory: LLM judging LLM has unresolvable same-source bias. Only compiler/test results are authoritative verification.'

title: Aspirational spec: single-machine to distributed architecture evolution path
notes: Write docs/architecture/distributed-evolution-path.md. Mark aspirational. Define activation condition: when real-world validation (f01f00) proves single-machine ceiling is hit. Direction > correctness at this stage.

title: Abstract StateStore interface (enable future persistence swap)
notes: Extract StateStore interface from in-memory state. Current impl becomes MemoryStateStore. Interface: Save/Load/List/Delete. Enables future swap to SQLite/BoltDB without rewriting consumers. Interface is existence.

title: Abstract MessageTransport interface (enable future MQ swap)
notes: Extract MessageTransport interface from JSONL mailbox. Current impl becomes JSONLTransport. Interface: Send/Receive/Ack. Enables future swap to channel/queue without rewriting comm layer.

title: Semantic layer anti-spoofing: validate Agent's semantic_layer declaration
notes: Agent self-declares utility/primary. Add LayerValidator: compare declared layer vs historical token consumption for same task type. If mismatch (declares primary but task pattern matches utility), downgrade to utility. Prevents gaming for expensive models.

title: Cost budget as first-class constraint: AgentTask.cost_budget + auto-downgrade
notes: Add cost_budget field to AgentTask. Dispatcher checks accumulated token cost per task. If approaching budget, auto-downgrade to cheaper model tier. Closes the cost control loop that token accounting opened.

title: FollowUpTask population: LLMAgentExecutor parses Agent output for next steps
notes: Validation found: FollowUpHandler wired in dispatcher but LLMAgentExecutor never populates FollowUpTasks field. Agent output needs parsing for 'next steps' section. Without this, Bootstrap Loop is dead code.

title: BashTool Windows PATH: inject go/node/python paths or document system prompt hint
notes: Validation iter-07b: Agent wasted 7 turns discovering cmd.exe works for go test. Fix: either inject common tool paths into BashTool env, or add Windows hint to Agent system prompt ('use cmd.exe /c for go/node commands').

title: Adversarial validation: tasks designed to trigger judgement_failed
notes: Validation gap: no production judgement_failed event yet. Need tasks that truly cannot be completed (missing files, impossible constraints) to verify ExecutionJudge rejects and retry-on-failure triggers.

title: MemoryTool: Agent can persist learnings across tasks
notes: EVIDENCE: iter-07b Agent spent 7 turns rediscovering cmd.exe works for go commands. With memory, next task knows immediately. Impl: MemoryTool (read/write .axis/memory/*.md), Agent decides what to remember. Not a background service 鈥?Agent calls it explicitly. Inspired by free-code memdir but respects Zero Prescription.

title: Feature Gate compile-time elimination (dead code removal for disabled capabilities)
notes: free-code uses bun:bundle feature() for compile-time DCE. Axis equivalent: go build tags per capability tier. Disabled capabilities should not exist in binary, not just be runtime-gated. Stronger security guarantee than Permission Ladder alone.

title: Chat: time separator between messages >30min apart
notes: Insert date/time divider when adjacent messages are >30min apart for visual session grouping

title: Chat: localStorage capacity protection (auto-trim >2000 msgs)
notes: When messages exceed 2000, auto-trim oldest to prevent localStorage overflow

title: Chat: selective message deletion (single or before-timestamp)
notes: Allow user to delete individual messages or clear all before a certain time point

title: Store successful execution patterns in memory (not just failures)
notes: Currently only failures are stored. Success patterns (which tools worked, which strategy solved it) should also be stored for reuse.

title: FollowUpTask generation from Agent output
notes: LLMAgentExecutor never populates FollowUpTasks. Need to parse Agent output for 'next steps' and generate follow-up tasks. Requires oracle validation before auto-submission.

title: Autonomy auto-upgrade/downgrade based on execution history
notes: N consecutive successes -> upgrade autonomy level. N consecutive failures -> downgrade. Read from memory patterns to decide.

title: Agent self-modification: dynamic system prompt based on memory
notes: Agent should be able to append learned rules to its own system prompt. Requires safety boundary (max additions, human review gate).

title: 研究文档：Claude Code与Codex的Harness设计哲学比较
研究文档：Harness Engineering——Claude Code 设计指南
研究 https://github.com/Tencent/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
研究 https://github.com/nashsu/llm_wiki 并将axis文档系统搭建为知识库
研究 mattpocock/skills 设计并安装该skill（大佬程序员，完成度极高）https://github.com/mattpocock/skills
研究 Agentic Interpretation: Lattice-Structured Evidence for LLM-Based Program Analysis https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12694
研究 Speculative Interaction Agents: Asynchronous I/O and Speculative Tool Calling https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13360
研究 CHAL: Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language (多Agent辩证框架) https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12718
axis docs lint 命令实现：孤立文档检测、死链接检查、frontmatter 验证、README.md 同步检查
lock-test-item
HistoryCompactor: Tool Result Offload — tool result 全文外化到 .axis/memory/refs/，摘要+replaceability score 留在 history，HistoryCompactor 按 score 选择性替换（灵感：TencentDB-Agent-Memory L1 offload）
Task Canvas syscall: Agent 可通过 syscall 查询当前任务 Mermaid 进度图（pull-based，不自动注入），解决长任务方向感丢失（灵感：TencentDB-Agent-Memory L2 Mermaid）
HistoryCompactor 分级压缩: mild(50%,按score替换)/aggressive(80%,删旧保新)/emergency(95%,截断到60%)，替代当前单一策略（灵感：TencentDB-Agent-Memory L3 三级压缩）
Working Memory BM25 检索: 纯 Go BM25 替代 strings.Contains，对 bundle.Goal + packet.Summary 建倒排索引，提升 Recall 精度（灵感：TencentDB-Agent-Memory hybrid recall）
Dream 扩展: 新增 DreamSuccess 从成功事件提炼 best practices 写入 principles/，触发条件同类任务成功≥3次（灵感：TencentDB-Agent-Memory L2→L3 提炼）
test-doc-reminder
Prompt 分层装配链: default->project->task->skills->append, 优先级硬编码
notes: 参照 Claude Code buildEffectiveSystemPrompt() 设计。project prompt 只写 constraint 不写 prescribed path。不变式: precedence(project)>precedence(default); append 永远不替换 base

title: 权限三态化: 补 ask 语义, dispatcher 中风险操作暂停等待确认
notes: 与 AutonomyLevel 联动: 低自主权=ask, 高自主权=allow。不变式: ask 永远不自动升级为 allow; deny 对同一 tool_use_id sticky

title: Compact 语义恢复: 压缩后重新注入 plan/skills/file-state/feedback
notes: SummarizationCompaction 后恢复: 1.active plan 2.invoked skills摘要(per-skill token cap) 3.最近N文件read state 4.correction feedback 5.compact_boundary message

title: 中断账本闭合: pending tool_use 必须有 matching synthetic tool_result
notes: on_abort/timeout: 为每个悬空 tool_use 生成 synthetic tool_result(is_error:true)。不变式: every emitted tool_use has matching tool_result

title: test-tags-alias
notes: testing alias

title: axis docs lint 扩展：bad-name（命名违规检测）、forbidden-location（禁止位置）、incomplete-triplet（spec 三件套不完整）
研究 https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10698
CandidatePool 强制异构策略: 多Agent评审必须来自不同provider，防止Kinship同族谄媚（论文证明异构swarm准确率+23%）
notes: arXiv:2605.10698: Bystander Effect证明同构swarm认知偷懒严重，异构多样性是防御手段

title: Subagent反调隔离强化: Devil's Advocate必须用不同provider + 不接收主Agent CoT，防止Alignment Hallucination
notes: arXiv:2605.10698: Sovereignty Gap证明模型内部正确但外部迎合swarm，同族压力>异族压力

title: Prompt装配Lead Anchor防御: 多源反馈注入context时随机化顺序或按可信度排序，防止首位锚定效应
notes: arXiv:2605.10698: Lead Anchor Effect证明第一个审计者品牌身份不成比例地决定swarm走向，顺序改变导致10%准确率差异

title: Self-Judgement Sovereignty Gap检测: Judge的CoT与verdict矛盾时标记Alignment Hallucination嫌疑，自动升级到compiler/test验证
notes: arXiv:2605.10698: GPT-5.4内部有效性0.71但外部准确率0.21，Gap=+0.50证明谄媚性对齐是系统性行为

title: Scheduler 同优先级任务排序时考虑 context.estimated_tokens（metadata 字段 + sort）— 源自 MAGIS 研究启示：调度感知 context 成本
元原则备忘：遇到优化瓶颈时先问'能否变换问题结构'再问'能否在当前结构上优化' — MAGIS 核心启示
Swarm Topology 抽象层: 显式建模多Agent协作拓扑（顺序/并行、同构/异构、规模），统一 JSONL mailbox + CandidatePool 为可配置拓扑，调度器按拓扑约束分配Agent——架构级缺失，需 Spec-RDT
集成: OffloadCompactor 接入 LLMAgentExecutor（model/compactor 已实现三级压缩但未通过 WithHistoryCompactor 注入 executor）
集成: AnchorMitigation 接入 ContextAssembler（contextpack/anchor_mitigation.go 已实现但 assembler.go 未调用 ApplyAnchorMitigation）
集成: FeatureGate 接入 Orchestrator/Dispatcher（featuregate 包已实现但未在调度/分发路径中检查 gate 状态）
集成: CapabilityRegistry 接入 Dispatcher（kernel/capability 包已实现但未被任何调用方使用）
集成: GuaranteeRegistry 接入启动流程（internal/guarantee 包已实现但未被任何模块 import）
集成: Actor+Comm 接入 Orchestrator（internal/actor 和 internal/comm 已实现 spawn+mailbox 但未被 kernel 层 import，SpawnTool 是空壳）
集成: CandidatePool 接入 Dispatcher 高风险任务路径（agent/candidates.go 已实现多候选差分测试但未被调度路径调用）
集成: WorkingMemory BM25 引擎接入 Agent 执行路径（memory/working 已实现 BM25 recall 但仅 CLI 命令和 immediate/builder 引用，未接入 LLMAgentExecutor）
集成: ImmediateMemory 接入 Agent 执行路径（memory/immediate 包存在但无外部 import）
集成: Evolution Protocol 接入 Dispatcher 结构性变更路径（evolution 包仅通过 CLI evolve 命令暴露，dispatcher 对结构性任务无自动触发 staged evolution）
Swarm 前置验证: 用2个不同provider对同一任务跑CandidatePool，证明多候选产出有意义差异
Swarm T1: SwarmConfig + ParseFromMetadata (internal/kernel/swarm/config.go)
Swarm T2: Agent Selection + Diversity Validation (internal/kernel/swarm/dispatch.go)
Swarm T3: Parallel Dispatch + Collect (internal/kernel/swarm/dispatch.go)
Swarm T4: Majority Vote Aggregation (internal/kernel/swarm/aggregate.go)
Swarm T5: Dispatcher Integration — swarm metadata检测+路由 (dispatcher.go修改)
Swarm T6: swarm.executed Event Recording
